calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Aruntun Kechedjian, 415.517.7914, defendant in propria persona; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ARUTUN KECHEDJIAN's MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-27-2014 Continued To Jun-06-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arutun Kechedjian, 415.577.7914, defendant in propria persona; No other appearances.

RULING: Matter discussed. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. The hearing on DEFENDANT ARUTUN KECHEDJIAN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is continued to June 6, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Defendant to provide notice of new hearing date to opposing party. Defendant has provided the Court with a copy of his moving papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Joyce Finley #8620.

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Aratun Kechedjian, 415.517.7914, defendant in propria persona; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ARUTUN KECHEDJIAN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is off calendar as untimely under CCP 1005(b). The motion was filed and served on March 6, 2014. Moving party only provided 15 court days notice and failed to provide five additional calendar days for service by mail. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
